title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: WALLOWA MEMORIAL MEDICAL CLINIC DOWNTOWN DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Warming space is the lobby. 306 W North Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted. No pets allowed. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm, Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm (541) 426-7900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-7900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Wallowa County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
